authors: Soulas T, Gurruchaga JM, Palfi S, Cesaro P, Nguyen JP, Fénelon G
title: Attempted and completed suicides after subthalamic nucleus stimulation for Parkinson's disease
study_question: Prevalence and characteristics of suicide after STN DBS in Parkinson's disease
population_assessed: 200 Parkinson's disease patients undergoing bilateral STN DBS at one center
follow_up_duration: Mean 12 months after surgery; study period 1997-2006
outcome_measures: Completed suicide, attempted suicide, depression, cognitive status, impulse regulation
inclusion_criteria: Parkinson's disease patients undergoing bilateral STN DBS at a single center
answer_to_study_question: Two patients completed suicide and four attempted; events linked to postoperative depression and impulse dysregulation.
